## Data Flow

### [Primary flow name, e.g., "User Request"]

```
[Input source] --> [Module A: description] --> [Module B: description] --> [Output target]
```

### [Secondary flow name, e.g., "Background Job"]

```
[Trigger] --> [Worker: description] --> [Storage: description]
```
